text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Carefully optimizing your trainee's workload while
managing her motivation with friendly banter...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing! Simply amazing! You must be the
greatest trainer in history! I'm so blessed to be a
reporter in this era!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But I can't stand here mesmerized—I must go back
to the office and write this article at once!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'll title it, "Top Tracen Trainer Gives All for
Beloved Umamusume!"
